SPIR-V Shader - Lambertian Diffuse

View SPIR-V (2840 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc Compiler; 1
; Capabilities: Shader
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor %UBO
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO_struct Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_struct 5 Offset 224

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%UBO_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_struct
%ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%c_i3 = OpConstant %uint 3 ; Index for lightPos in UBO
%c_f0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%c_f1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2

; Global variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4float Output
%UBO = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%ext_inst_GLSL_std_450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%entry = OpLabel
%v_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%v_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%v_normal_normalized = OpNormalize %v3float %v_normal
%ptr_lightPos = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %UBO %c_i3
%v_lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_lightPos
%v_lightPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %v_lightPos %v_lightPos %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2 ; Extract xyz from lightPos (vec4)
%L_unnormalized = OpFSub %v3float %v_lightPos_xyz %v_worldPos
%L = OpNormalize %v3float %L_unnormalized
%dot_NL = OpDot %float %v_normal_normalized %L
%clamped_d = OpExtInst %float %ext_inst_GLSL_std_450 FMax %dot_NL %c_f0
%out_color_vec4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %clamped_d %clamped_d %clamped_d %c_f1
OpStore %outColor %out_color_vec4
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL; 1
; Capabilities: Shader
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport %GLSLstd450 "GLSL.std.450"
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %ubo_var %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; All types and constants
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

OpDecorate %UBO_block Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_block 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0

%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%_ptr_Function_mat4 = OpTypePointer Function %mat4
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO_block = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_block
%_ptr_Uniform_mat4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%void_func_type = OpTypeFunction %void

%UBO_block = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO_block = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_block

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5
%uint_32 = OpConstant %uint 32

; Global variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%ubo_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO_block Uniform

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func_type
%entry = OpLabel
  ; Get input variables
  %_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
  %_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal

  ; Get UBO values
  %lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo_var %int_3
  %lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
  %cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo_var %int_4
  %cameraPos = OpLoad %v4float %cameraPos_ptr

  ; Normalize N
  %N = OpNormalize %v3float %_normal

  ; Calculate L (light direction)
  %lightPos_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos %lightPos %int_0 %int_1 %int_2
  %L_unnorm = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_v3 %_worldPos
  %L = OpNormalize %v3float %L_unnorm

  ; Calculate V (view direction)
  %cameraPos_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %cameraPos %cameraPos %int_0 %int_1 %int_2
  %V_unnorm = OpFSub %v3float %cameraPos_v3 %_worldPos
  %V = OpNormalize %v3float %V_unnorm

  ; Calculate diffuse
  %N_dot_L = OpDot %float %N %L
  %diffuse_pre_max = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 FMax %N_dot_L %float_0_0
  %diffuse = OpCopyObject %float %diffuse_pre_max

  ; Calculate R (reflect(-L, N))
  %neg_L = OpFNegate %v3float %L
  %N_dot_neg_L = OpDot %float %N %neg_L
  %two = OpConstant %float 2.0 ; Use OpConstant for 2.0
  %two_times_N_dot_neg_L = OpFMul %float %two %N_dot_neg_L
  %two_N_dot_neg_L_times_N = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %N %two_times_N_dot_neg_L
  %R = OpFSub %v3float %neg_L %two_N_dot_neg_L_times_N
  %R_norm = OpNormalize %v3float %R

  ; Calculate specular
  %R_dot_V = OpDot %float %R_norm %V
  %specular_pre_max = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 FMax %R_dot_V %float_0_0
  %specular = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Pow %specular_pre_max %uint_32

  ; Calculate final grayscale intensity
  %term1 = OpCopyObject %float %float_0_2
  %term2 = OpFMul %float %float_0_5 %diffuse
  %term3 = OpFMul %float %float_0_8 %specular
  %sum1 = OpFAdd %float %term1 %term2
  %intensity = OpFAdd %float %sum1 %term3

  ; Create output color
  %outColor_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %intensity %intensity %intensity %float_1_0
  OpStore %outColor %outColor_v4
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

               OpCapability Shader
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; --- Decorations ---
               OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %normal Location 1
               OpDecorate %uv Location 2
               OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
               OpDecorate %color Location 4
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Uniform Buffer Decorations
               OpDecorate %UBO_Struct Block
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_Struct 0 Offset 0    ; model
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_Struct 1 Offset 64   ; view
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_Struct 2 Offset 128  ; projection
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_Struct 3 Offset 192  ; lightPos
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_Struct 4 Offset 208  ; cameraPos
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_Struct 5 Offset 224  ; params

; --- Types ---
       %void = OpTypeVoid
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
    %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
       %mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4 ; Column-major by default

; UBO Structure
 %UBO_Struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float

; Pointers
%ptr_Input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_Input_v2 = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_Input_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float ; for color, though it's vec3, it's safer to read as v4 and shuffle.
%ptr_Output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_Struct
%ptr_Uniform_v4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; --- Constants ---
    %float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
   %float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
   %float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
   %float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
    %float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
      %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
      %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
      %int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
      %int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
      %int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
      %int_5 = OpConstant %int 5
      %int_64 = OpConstant %float 64.0 ; Shininess

; --- Variables ---
   %worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3 Input
     %normal = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3 Input
         %uv = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v2 Input
    %tangent = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3 Input
       %color = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3 Input
   %outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4 Output
%_uniform_UBO = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; --- Main Function ---
       %main = OpFunction %void None %void
 %main_label = OpLabel

; 1. Load Inputs
  %v3_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
    %v3_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal
  %v3_in_color = OpLoad %v3float %color

; 2. Load UBO Data
; Access lightPos
 %ptr_lightPos = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4 %_uniform_UBO %int_3
 %v4_lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_lightPos
  %v3_lightPos = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %v4_lightPos %v4_lightPos %int_0 %int_1 %int_2

; Access cameraPos
%ptr_cameraPos = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4 %_uniform_UBO %int_4
%v4_cameraPos = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_cameraPos
 %v3_cameraPos = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %v4_cameraPos %v4_cameraPos %int_0 %int_1 %int_2

; 3. Lighting Vectors
; N = normalize(normal)
          %N = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %v3_normal

; L = normalize(lightPos - worldPos)
      %L_sub = OpFSub %v3float %v3_lightPos %v3_worldPos
          %L = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %L_sub

; V = normalize(cameraPos - worldPos)
      %V_sub = OpFSub %v3float %v3_cameraPos %v3_worldPos
          %V = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %V_sub

; H = normalize(L + V)
      %H_add = OpFAdd %v3float %L %V
          %H = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %H_add

; 4. Diffuse Component: max(dot(N,L),0)
    %N_dot_L = OpDot %float %N %L
    %diffuse = OpExtInst %float %1 FMax %N_dot_L %float_0

; 5. Specular Component: pow(max(dot(N,H),0),64)
    %N_dot_H = OpDot %float %N %H
  %spec_base = OpExtInst %float %1 FMax %N_dot_H %float_0
   %specular = OpExtInst %float %1 Pow %spec_base %int_64

; 6. Grayscale intensity = (0.1 + 0.6*diffuse + 0.8*specular) with alpha 1.0
%term_diffuse = OpFMul %float %float_0_6 %diffuse
%term_specular = OpFMul %float %float_0_8 %specular
    %sum_terms = OpFAdd %float %float_0_1 %term_diffuse
%grayscale_intensity = OpFAdd %float %sum_terms %term_specular

%final_color_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %grayscale_intensity %grayscale_intensity %grayscale_intensity %float_1

               OpStore %outColor %final_color_v4
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 1
; Capabilities: Shader
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPosIn %normalIn %outColor %ubo
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %worldPosIn "worldPos"
OpName %normalIn "normal"
OpName %uvIn "uv"
OpName %tangentIn "tangent"
OpName %colorIn "color"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo "ubo"
OpName %_ptr_Uniform_UBO "_ptr_Uniform_UBO"
OpName %_ptr_Input_v3float "_ptr_Input_v3float"
OpName %_ptr_Input_v2float "_ptr_Input_v2float"
OpName %_ptr_Output_v4float "_ptr_Output_v4float"
OpName %_ptr_Uniform_v4float "_ptr_Uniform_v4float"
OpName %_ptr_Function_v3float "_ptr_Function_v3float"
OpName %_ptr_Function_float "_ptr_Function_float"

; GLSL.std.450 Extended Instruction Set
%GLSLstd450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%func = OpTypeFunction %void

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float ; model, view, projection, lightPos, cameraPos, params
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_3_0 = OpConstant %float 3.0

%v3float_base_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_2 %float_0_3 %float_0_8
%v3float_rim_tint = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_0_8 %float_0_5

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPosIn Location 0
OpDecorate %normalIn Location 1
OpDecorate %uvIn Location 2
OpDecorate %tangentIn Location 3
OpDecorate %colorIn Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Global Variables
%worldPosIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normalIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uvIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangentIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%colorIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %func
%label_main = OpLabel
  ; Get inputs
  %worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPosIn
  %normal = OpLoad %v3float %normalIn

  ; Get UBO members
  %lightPosPtr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %uint_3
  %lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %lightPosPtr
  %cameraPosPtr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %uint_4
  %cameraPos = OpLoad %v4float %cameraPosPtr

  ; Normalize normal (N)
  %N = OpNormalize %v3float %normal

  ; Calculate view vector (V)
  %cameraPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %cameraPos %cameraPos %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
  %V_unnormalized = OpFSub %v3float %cameraPos_xyz %worldPos
  %V = OpNormalize %v3float %V_unnormalized

  ; Calculate light vector (L)
  ; Assuming point light: L = lightPos.xyz - worldPos
  %lightPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos %lightPos %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
  %L_unnormalized = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %worldPos
  %L = OpNormalize %v3float %L_unnormalized

  ; Diffuse calculation: diffuse = max(dot(N,L), 0)
  %dotNL = OpDot %float %N %L
  %diffuse_clamped = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 FMax %dotNL %float_0

  ; Rim (Fresnel) lighting: rim = pow(1 - max(dot(N,V),0), 3)
  %dotNV = OpDot %float %N %V
  %maxDotNV_0 = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 FMax %dotNV %float_0
  %one_minus_maxDotNV_0 = OpFSub %float %float_1 %maxDotNV_0
  %rim = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Pow %one_minus_maxDotNV_0 %float_3_0

  ; Base color (0.2, 0.3, 0.8) modulated by (0.3 + 0.5*diffuse)
  %diffuse_times_0_5 = OpFMul %float %diffuse_clamped %float_0_5
  %add_0_3 = OpFAdd %float %float_0_3 %diffuse_times_0_5
  %base_color_mod_vec = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v3float_base_color %add_0_3

  ; Add rim tint (1.0, 0.8, 0.5) * rim
  %rim_tint_comp_vec = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v3float_rim_tint %rim

  ; Final color: base_color_mod + rim_tint_comp
  %final_rgb = OpFAdd %v3float %base_color_mod_vec %rim_tint_comp_vec

  ; Output alpha 1.0
  %final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_rgb %float_1

  OpStore %outColor %final_color

  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 1
; Capabilities: Shader

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPosIn %normalIn %uvIn %tangentIn %colorIn %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; External instruction set
%glsl = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; All Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; Pointer Types
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %_struct_UBO

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_15 = OpConstant %float 0.15
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05

%skyColor_const = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_4 %float_0_6 %float_1_0
%groundColor_const = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_3 %float_0_15 %float_0_05
%vec4_alpha_1 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0


; UBO Structure
%_struct_UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float ; model, view, proj, lightPos, cameraPos, params

; Decorations
; Input variables
OpDecorate %worldPosIn Location 0
OpDecorate %normalIn Location 1
OpDecorate %uvIn Location 2
OpDecorate %tangentIn Location 3
OpDecorate %colorIn Location 4

; Output variables
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO decorations
OpDecorate %_struct_UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 3 Offset 192 ; lightPos
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 4 Offset 208 ; cameraPos
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 5 Offset 224 ; params
OpDecorate %UBO_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO_var Binding 0

; Global Variables
%worldPosIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normalIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uvIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangentIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%colorIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%UBO_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void
%main_label = OpLabel

  ; Get normalized normal
  %normalRaw = OpLoad %v3float %normalIn
  %normalNormalized = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %normalRaw

  ; Get N.y component
  %ny = OpCompositeExtract %float %normalNormalized 1

  ; Calculate blend factor: N.y * 0.5 + 0.5
  %ny_scaled = OpFmul %float %ny %float_0_5
  %blendFactor = OpFAdd %float %ny_scaled %float_0_5

  ; Calculate (1 - blendFactor)
  %one_minus_blendFactor = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %blendFactor

  ; Interpolate ambient color: groundColor * (1 - blendFactor) + skyColor * blendFactor
  ; The instruction says "skyColor (0.4, 0.6, 1.0) and groundColor (0.3, 0.15, 0.05) blended by N.y * 0.5 + 0.5"
  ; if N.y = -1, blendFactor = 0, should be groundColor
  ; if N.y = 1, blendFactor = 1, should be skyColor
  ; So it should be: groundColor * (1 - blendFactor) + skyColor * blendFactor
  %ambientGroundContribution = OpFmul %v3float %groundColor_const %one_minus_blendFactor
  %ambientSkyContribution = OpFmul %v3float %skyColor_const %blendFactor
  %ambientColor = OpFAdd %v3float %ambientGroundContribution %ambientSkyContribution

  ; Get worldPos
  %worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPosIn

  ; Get lightPos from UBO
  %lightPosPtr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %UBO_var %int_3 ; Index 3 for lightPos
  %lightPosRaw = OpLoad %v4float %lightPosPtr
  %lightPos3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPosRaw %lightPosRaw 0 1 2 ; Extract vec3 from vec4 lightPos

  ; Calculate light direction L = normalize(lightPos - worldPos)
  %lightDirRaw = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos3 %worldPos
  %lightDirNormalized = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %lightDirRaw

  ; Calculate diffuse factor: dot(normalNormalized, lightDirNormalized)
  %diffuseFactorRaw = OpExtInst %float %glsl Dot %normalNormalized %lightDirNormalized
  ; Clamp diffuse factor to 0.0 (negative dot product means light is behind surface)
  %diffuseFactor = OpExtInst %float %glsl Fmax %diffuseFactorRaw %float_0_0

  ; Calculate diffuse term: 0.3 * diffuseFactor
  %diffuseTerm = OpFmul %float %float_0_3 %diffuseFactor

  ; Create a vec3 diffuse contribution from scalar diffuseTerm
  %diffuseContribution = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %diffuseTerm %diffuseTerm %diffuseTerm

  ; Final color RGB = ambientColor + diffuseContribution
  %finalColorRGB = OpFAdd %v3float %ambientColor %diffuseContribution

  ; Construct final output color with alpha 1.0
  %outColorFinal = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %finalColorRGB %float_1_0

  OpStore %outColor %outColorFinal
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %_worldPos %_outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %_worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %_outColor "outColor"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %_ubo_instance "ubo_instance"

OpDecorate %_worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %_outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %_ubo_instance DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_ubo_instance Binding 0

%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4 ; Column-major

%ptr_Input_v3f = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_Output_v4f = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_mat4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4
%ptr_Uniform_v4f = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

%_worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3f Input
%_outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4f Output
%_ubo_instance = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%c_f0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%c_f0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%c_f0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%c_f0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%c_f1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0

%c_v3f_bottom = OpConstantComposite %v3float %c_f0_1 %c_f0_4 %c_f0_1
%c_v3f_top = OpConstantComposite %v3float %c_f1_0 %c_f1_0 %c_f1_0

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%label = OpLabel
  %worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %_worldPos
  %worldPos_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %worldPos_val 1
  %mul_y_0_5 = OpFMul %float %worldPos_y %c_f0_5
  %add_0_5 = OpFAdd %float %mul_y_0_5 %c_f0_5
  %max_0_0 = OpFMax %float %add_0_5 %c_f0_0
  %t = OpFMin %float %max_0_0 %c_f1_0
  %one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %c_f1_0 %t
  %bottom_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %c_v3f_bottom %one_minus_t
  %top_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %c_v3f_top %t
  %mixed_color_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %bottom_scaled %top_scaled
  %outColor_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mixed_color_v3 %c_f1_0
  OpStore %_outColor %outColor_v4
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc Compiler; 9
; Capabilities: Shader
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

; OpSource GLSL 450
; OpName %main "main"
; OpName %worldPos_0 "worldPos"
; OpName %normal_0 "normal"
; OpName %color_0 "color"
; OpName %outColor "outColor"
; OpName %_struct_UBO "UBO"
; OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 0 "model"
; OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 1 "view"
; OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 2 "projection"
; OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 3 "lightPos"
; OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 4 "cameraPos"
; OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 5 "params"
; OpName %_ubo_instance "UBO_Instance"

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos_0 %normal_0 %color_0 %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos_0 Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_0 Location 1
OpDecorate %color_0 Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %_struct_UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %_ubo_instance DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_ubo_instance Binding 0

; GLSL.std.450 instruction set
%glsl = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%_struct_UBO = OpTypeStruct %m4float %m4float %m4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %_struct_UBO
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_1_5 = OpConstant %float 1.5
%float_3_0 = OpConstant %float 3.0

%v3float_base_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_8 %float_0_2 %float_0_2 ; Base Color (0.8, 0.2, 0.2)
%v3float_fog_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_8 ; Fog Color (0.7, 0.7, 0.8)

%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3 ; Index for lightPos in UBO
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4 ; Index for cameraPos in UBO

; Global Variables
%worldPos_0 = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal_0 = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color_0 = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%_ubo_instance = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Function main
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%main_label = OpLabel
  ; Local variables
  %lightDir_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_v3float Function
  %diffuse_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_float Function
  %lambertianFactor_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_float Function
  %finalBaseColor_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_v3float Function
  %dist_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_float Function
  %fogFactor_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_float Function

  ; Pointers to UBO members
  %lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %_ubo_instance %uint_3
  %cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %_ubo_instance %uint_4

  ; Load inputs
  %worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos_0
  %normal_val = OpLoad %v3float %normal_0

  ; Normalize normal
  %normalizedNormal = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %normal_val

  ; Calculate lightDir (worldPos to lightPos)
  %lightPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
  %lightPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos_val %lightPos_val 0 1 2 ; Extract xyz
  %lightVec = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %worldPos_val
  %normalizedLightDir = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %lightVec
  OpStore %lightDir_var %normalizedLightDir

  ; Calculate diffuse: max(dot(normal, lightDir), 0.0)
  %lightDir_loaded = OpLoad %v3float %lightDir_var
  %dot_product = OpDot %float %normalizedNormal %lightDir_loaded
  %diffuse_clamped = OpExtInst %float %glsl FMax %dot_product %float_0_0
  OpStore %diffuse_var %diffuse_clamped

  ; Calculate Lambertian Factor: (0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse)
  %diffuse_loaded = OpLoad %float %diffuse_var
  %scaled_diffuse = OpFMul %float %float_0_7 %diffuse_loaded
  %lambertianFactor = OpFAdd %float %float_0_3 %scaled_diffuse
  OpStore %lambertianFactor_var %lambertianFactor

  ; Apply Lambertian factor to base color (0.8, 0.2, 0.2)
  %lambertianFactor_loaded = OpLoad %float %lambertianFactor_var
  %finalBaseColor_x = OpFMul %float %OpCompositeExtract %float %v3float_base_color 0 %lambertianFactor_loaded
  %finalBaseColor_y = OpFMul %float %OpCompositeExtract %float %v3float_base_color 1 %lambertianFactor_loaded
  %finalBaseColor_z = OpFMul %float %OpCompositeExtract %float %v3float_base_color 2 %lambertianFactor_loaded
  %finalBaseColor_vec3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %finalBaseColor_x %finalBaseColor_y %finalBaseColor_z
  OpStore %finalBaseColor_var %finalBaseColor_vec3

  ; Calculate distance from cameraPos to worldPos
  %cameraPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %cameraPos_ptr
  %cameraPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %cameraPos_val %cameraPos_val 0 1 2 ; Extract xyz
  %distVec = OpFSub %v3float %cameraPos_xyz %worldPos_val
  %dist = OpExtInst %float %glsl Length %distVec
  OpStore %dist_var %dist

  ; Calculate fog factor: clamp((dist - 1.5) / 3.0, 0.0, 1.0)
  %dist_loaded = OpLoad %float %dist_var
  %dist_minus_1_5 = OpFSub %float %dist_loaded %float_1_5
  %div_by_3_0 = OpFDiv %float %dist_minus_1_5 %float_3_0
  %fogFactor_clamped = OpExtInst %float %glsl Clamp %div_by_3_0 %float_0_0 %float_1_0
  OpStore %fogFactor_var %fogFactor_clamped

  ; Mix finalBaseColor and fogColor using fogFactor
  %finalBaseColor_loaded = OpLoad %v3float %finalBaseColor_var
  %fogFactor_loaded = OpLoad %float %fogFactor_var

  %mixedColor_x = OpExtInst %float %glsl Mix %OpCompositeExtract %float %finalBaseColor_loaded 0 %OpCompositeExtract %float %v3float_fog_color 0 %fogFactor_loaded
  %mixedColor_y = OpExtInst %float %glsl Mix %OpCompositeExtract %float %finalBaseColor_loaded 1 %OpCompositeExtract %float %v3float_fog_color 1 %fogFactor_loaded
  %mixedColor_z = OpExtInst %float %glsl Mix %OpCompositeExtract %float %finalBaseColor_loaded 2 %OpCompositeExtract %float %v3float_fog_color 2 %fogFactor_loaded
  %mixedColor_vec3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %mixedColor_x %mixedColor_y %mixedColor_z

  ; Set alpha to 1.0 and write to outColor
  %outColor_val = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %OpCompositeExtract %float %mixedColor_vec3 0 %OpCompositeExtract %float %mixedColor_vec3 1 %OpCompositeExtract %float %mixedColor_vec3 2 %float_1_0
  OpStore %outColor %outColor_val

  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc Compiler; 9
; Capabilities: Shader
; Extension: SPV_KHR_shader_ballot

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO Binding 0
OpDecorate %type_UBO Block
OpDecorate %model Offset 0
OpDecorate %view Offset 64
OpDecorate %projection Offset 128
OpDecorate %lightPos Offset 192
OpDecorate %cameraPos Offset 208
OpDecorate %params Offset 224

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

%type_UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_type_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %type_UBO

%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float ; for lightPos, cameraPos, params
%_ptr_Uniform_mat4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4       ; for model, view, projection

%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_Function_bool = OpTypePointer Function %bool

; Constants
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_75 = OpConstant %float 0.75
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%v3const_cool = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_2 %float_0_2 %float_0_75
%v3const_warm = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_4
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5

; Variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%UBO = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_type_UBO Uniform

%main = OpFunction %void None %void
%entry = OpLabel
  %_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
  %_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal

  ; Get lightPos from UBO
  %_ptr_lightPos = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %UBO %uint_3
  %_lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %_ptr_lightPos

  ; Normalize normal
  %_normalizedNormal = OpNormalize %v3float %_normal

  ; Calculate light vector (lightPos.xyz - worldPos) and normalize
  %_lightPosXYZ = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %_lightPos %_lightPos %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
  %_lightDir = OpFSub %v3float %_lightPosXYZ %_worldPos
  %_normalizedLightDir = OpNormalize %v3float %_lightDir

  ; Calculate t = dot(N,L) * 0.5 + 0.5
  %_dotNL = OpDot %float %_normalizedNormal %_normalizedLightDir
  %_mult0_5 = OpFMul %float %_dotNL %float_0_5
  %t = OpFAdd %float %_mult0_5 %float_0_5

  ; Interpolate colors: mix(cool, warm, t)
  ; cool * (1-t) + warm * t
  %_oneMinusT = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %t
  %_coolScaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v3const_cool %_oneMinusT
  %_warmScaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v3const_warm %t
  %_interpolatedColor = OpFAdd %v3float %_coolScaled %_warmScaled

  ; Construct final output color with alpha 1.0
  %_finalColor = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %_interpolatedColor %float_1_0
  OpStore %outColor %_finalColor
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (4789 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 10
; Capabilities: Shader
; Extension: SPV_KHR_shader_ballot
; Extension: SPV_KHR_variable_pointers
; Extension: SPV_KHR_shader_draw_parameters
; Extension: SPV_KHR_multiview
; Extension: SPV_KHR_variable_pointers
; Extension: SPV_KHR_storage_buffer_storage_class
; Extension: SPV_KHR_shader_float_controls
; Extension: SPV_KHR_non_uniform
; Extension: SPV_KHR_vulkan_memory_model
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %uv %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Function_v2float = OpTypePointer Function %v2float
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_Function_int = OpTypePointer Function %int
%_ptr_Function_bool = OpTypePointer Function %bool

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2
%float_3 = OpConstant %float 3
%float_4 = OpConstant %float 4
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_20 = OpConstant %float 20
%float_minus_1 = OpConstant %float -1
%float_minus_2 = OpConstant %float -2
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_20 = OpConstant %int 20
%v2float_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v2float %float_0 %float_0
%v4float_0_0_0_1 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0 %float_0 %float_0 %float_1

; Variables
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_function
%void_function = OpTypeFunction %void
%entry = OpLabel
%_z = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_v2float Function
%_c = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_v2float Function
%_iterations = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_int Function
%_t = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_float Function
%_outColor_temp = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_v4float Function

OpStore %_z %v2float_0_0
OpStore %_iterations %int_0

%_uv_load = OpLoad %v2float %uv
%_uv_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %_uv_load 0
%_uv_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %_uv_load 1

; c.x = uv.x * 3 - 2
%_c_x_temp_mul = OpFmul %float %_uv_x %float_3
%_c_x = OpFadd %float %_c_x_temp_mul %float_minus_2

; c.y = uv.y * 2 - 1
%_c_y_temp_mul = OpFmul %float %_uv_y %float_2
%_c_y = OpFadd %float %_c_y_temp_mul %float_minus_1

%_c_val = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %_c_x %_c_y
OpStore %_c %_c_val

OpBranch %loop_header

%loop_header = OpLabel
%_iterations_load = OpLoad %int %_iterations
%_loop_cond = OpSLessThan %bool %_iterations_load %int_20
OpLoopMerge %loop_exit %loop_body %_loop_cond
OpBranchConditional %_loop_cond %loop_body %loop_exit

%loop_body = OpLabel
%_z_load = OpLoad %v2float %_z
%_z_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %_z_load 0
%_z_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %_z_load 1

; |z|^2 > 4.0
%_z_x_sq = OpFmul %float %_z_x %_z_x
%_z_y_sq = OpFmul %float %_z_y %_z_y
%_z_mag_sq = OpFadd %float %_z_x_sq %_z_y_sq
%_escape_cond = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %_z_mag_sq %float_4

OpBranchConditional %_escape_cond %loop_exit %continue_loop

%continue_loop = OpLabel
; Increment iterations
%_iterations_inc = OpIAdd %int %_iterations_load %int_1
OpStore %_iterations %_iterations_inc

; z_next.x = z.x*z.x - z.y*z.y + c.x
%_z_x_sq_next = OpFmul %float %_z_x %_z_x
%_z_y_sq_next = OpFmul %float %_z_y %_z_y
%_temp_x_sub = OpFsub %float %_z_x_sq_next %_z_y_sq_next
%_c_load = OpLoad %v2float %_c
%_c_x_load = OpCompositeExtract %float %_c_load 0
%_z_next_x = OpFadd %float %_temp_x_sub %_c_x_load

; z_next.y = 2*z.x*z.y + c.y
%_temp_y_mul1 = OpFmul %float %float_2 %_z_x
%_temp_y_mul2 = OpFmul %float %_temp_y_mul1 %_z_y
%_c_y_load = OpCompositeExtract %float %_c_load 1
%_z_next_y = OpFadd %float %_temp_y_mul2 %_c_y_load

%_z_next_val = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %_z_next_x %_z_next_y
OpStore %_z %_z_next_val
OpBranch %loop_header

%loop_exit = OpLabel
%_final_iterations = OpLoad %int %_iterations
%_final_iterations_f = OpConvertSToF %float %_final_iterations
%_t_val = OpFdiv %float %_final_iterations_f %float_20
OpStore %_t %_t_val

%_t_load = OpLoad %float %_t

; color.r = t
%_color_r = %_t_load

; color.g = t * 0.5
%_color_g = OpFmul %float %_t_load %float_0_5

; color.b = 1.0 - t
%_color_b = OpFsub %float %float_1 %_t_load

; color.a = 1.0
%_color_a = %float_1

%_final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %_color_r %_color_g %_color_b %_color_a
OpStore %outColor %_final_color
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google-Gemini
; Capabilities: Shader
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport %c_int_1_11 "GLSL.std.450"

OpEntryPoint Fragment %1 "main" %2 %3 %4 %5
OpExecutionMode %1 OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Names
OpName %1 "main"
OpName %2 "worldPos"
OpName %3 "normal"
OpName %4 "uv"
OpName %5 "outColor"
OpName %6 "UBO"
OpMemberName %6 0 "model"
OpMemberName %6 1 "view"
OpMemberName %6 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %6 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %6 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %6 5 "params"
OpName %7 "uboVar"
OpName %8 "lightPos_val"
OpName %9 "cameraPos_val"
OpName %10 "params_val"
OpName %11 "uv_scaled"
OpName %12 "uv_mod"
OpName %13 "row_idx"
OpName %14 "is_even_row"
OpName %15 "stagger_offset"
OpName %16 "brick_coord_x"
OpName %17 "brick_coord_y"
OpName %18 "is_mortar_x"
OpName %19 "is_mortar_y"
OpName %20 "is_mortar"
OpName %21 "brick_color_vec3"
OpName %22 "mortar_color_vec3"
OpName %23 "current_color_rgb"
OpName %24 "normal_val_vec3"
OpName %25 "normalized_normal"
OpName %26 "worldPos_val_vec3"
OpName %27 "light_dir_vec3"
OpName %28 "normalized_light_dir"
OpName %29 "diffuse_factor"
OpName %30 "lambertian_factor"
OpName %31 "final_rgb_color"
OpName %32 "final_rgba_color"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %2 Location 0
OpDecorate %3 Location 1
OpDecorate %4 Location 2
OpDecorate %5 Location 0
OpDecorate %6 Block
OpMemberDecorate %6 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %6 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %6 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %6 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %6 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %6 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %7 DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %7 Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4float = OpTypeMatrix %float 4

%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_Function_v2float = OpTypePointer Function %v2float
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; UBO Structure
%6 = OpTypeStruct %m4float %m4float %m4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %6
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_m4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %m4float

%_ptr_Private_v3float = OpTypePointer Private %v3float

; Constants
%c_float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%c_float_0_025 = OpConstant %float 0.025 ; 0.05 / 2 for X mortar thickness
%c_float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05  ; 0.1 / 2 for Y mortar thickness
%c_float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%c_float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%c_float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%c_float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%c_float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%c_float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%c_float_0_75 = OpConstant %float 0.75 ; For brick color
%c_float_0_9 = OpConstant %float 0.9  ; 1.0 - 0.1
%c_float_0_95 = OpConstant %float 0.95 ; 1.0 - 0.05 for Y mortar
%c_float_0_975 = OpConstant %float 0.975 ; 1.0 - 0.025 for X mortar
%c_float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%c_float_2_0 = OpConstant %float 2.0
%c_float_5_0 = OpConstant %float 5.0
%c_float_8_0 = OpConstant %float 8.0
%c_float_16_0 = OpConstant %float 16.0

%c_int_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%c_int_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%c_int_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%c_int_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%c_int_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%c_int_5 = OpConstant %uint 5

%c_v3float_brick_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %c_float_0_7 %c_float_0_2 %c_float_0_1
%c_v3float_mortar_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %c_float_0_7 %c_float_0_7 %c_float_0_7
%c_v4float_alpha_one = OpConstantComposite %v4float %c_float_1_0 %c_float_1_0 %c_float_1_0 %c_float_1_0

; Global Variables
%2 = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input ; worldPos
%3 = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input ; normal
%4 = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input ; uv
%5 = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output ; outColor
%7 = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform ; uboVar

%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; Main function
%1 = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%label_main = OpLabel

; Load Inputs
%worldPos_val_vec3 = OpLoad %v3float %2
%normal_val_vec3 = OpLoad %v3float %3
%uv_val_vec2 = OpLoad %v2float %4

; Load UBO members (lightPos, cameraPos, params)
%ptr_lightPos = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %7 %c_int_3
%lightPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_lightPos
%ptr_cameraPos = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %7 %c_int_4
%cameraPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_cameraPos
%ptr_params = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %7 %c_int_5
%params_val = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_params

; Brick pattern logic
; Scale UV by 8x16
%uv_scaled_unoffset = OpFMul %v2float %uv_val_vec2 (OpConstantComposite %v2float %c_float_8_0 %c_float_16_0)

; Staggered rows: half-brick offset every other row
%uv_scaled_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_scaled_unoffset 1
%row_idx = OpConvertFToS %int %uv_scaled_y
%is_odd_row_int = OpSMod %int %row_idx %c_int_2 ; 0 for even, 1 for odd
%is_odd_row = OpINotEqual %bool %is_odd_row_int %c_int_0 ; true if odd, false if even
%stagger_offset = OpSelect %float %is_odd_row %c_float_0_5 %c_float_0_0
%uv_scaled_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_scaled_unoffset 0
%uv_scaled_x_staggered = OpFAdd %float %uv_scaled_x %stagger_offset
%uv_scaled = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %uv_scaled_x_staggered %uv_scaled_y ; Renaming for clarity in subsequent steps

; Calculate if in mortar
%brick_coord_x = OpFract %float %uv_scaled_x_staggered
%brick_coord_y = OpFract %float %uv_scaled_y

%is_mortar_x = OpLogicalOr %bool (OpFOrdLessThan %bool %brick_coord_x %c_float_0_025) (OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %brick_coord_x %c_float_0_975)
%is_mortar_y = OpLogicalOr %bool (OpFOrdLessThan %bool %brick_coord_y %c_float_0_05) (OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %brick_coord_y %c_float_0_95)
%is_mortar = OpLogicalOr %bool %is_mortar_x %is_mortar_y

%current_color_rgb = OpSelect %v3float %is_mortar %c_v3float_mortar_color %c_v3float_brick_color

; Lambertian shading
%normalized_normal = OpNormalize %v3float %normal_val_vec3

; Calculate light direction (lightPos.xyz - worldPos)
%lightPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos_val %lightPos_val %c_int_0 %c_int_1 %c_int_2
%light_dir_vec3 = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %worldPos_val_vec3
%normalized_light_dir = OpNormalize %v3float %light_dir_vec3

%dot_product = OpDot %float %normalized_normal %normalized_light_dir
%diffuse_factor = OpExtInst %float %c_int_1_11 GLSL.std.450.max %dot_product %c_float_0_0

; Lambertian factor: (0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse)
%mul_diffuse = OpFMul %float %c_float_0_6 %diffuse_factor
%lambertian_factor = OpFAdd %float %c_float_0_4 %mul_diffuse

%final_rgb_color = OpFMul %v3float %current_color_rgb (OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %lambertian_factor %lambertian_factor %lambertian_factor)

; Output with alpha 1.0
%final_rgba_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float (OpCompositeExtract %float %final_rgb_color 0) (OpCompositeExtract %float %final_rgb_color 1) (OpCompositeExtract %float %final_rgb_color 2) %c_float_1_0
OpStore %5 %final_rgba_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (4418 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL; 
; Capabilities: Shader
; Extension: SPV_KHR_shader_ballot
; Extension: SPV_KHR_shader_draw_parameters

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %outColor %_
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %_ DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_ Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4 ; For cameraPos index in UBO

; Global variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%_ = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform ; Uniform buffer instance

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
%N = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_v3float Function
%V = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_v3float Function
%NdotV_val = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_float Function
%finalColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_v4float Function

; Load Inputs
%loaded_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%loaded_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos

; Get cameraPos from UBO
%_uniform_CameraPos_Offset_208 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %_ %uint_4 ; Access cameraPos (index 4)
%cameraPos_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %_uniform_CameraPos_Offset_208
%cameraPos_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %cameraPos_v4 %cameraPos_v4 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2 ; Extract XYZ

; Normalize N (normal)
%normalized_N = OpVectorNormalize %v3float %loaded_normal
OpStore %N %normalized_N

; Calculate V (view vector) and normalize
%view_vec_unnormalized = OpFSub %v3float %cameraPos_v3 %loaded_worldPos
%normalized_V = OpVectorNormalize %v3float %view_vec_unnormalized
OpStore %V %normalized_V

; Calculate NdotV = max(dot(N, V), 0.0f)
%loaded_N = OpLoad %v3float %N
%loaded_V = OpLoad %v3float %V
%dot_NV = OpDot %float %loaded_N %loaded_V
%NdotV = OpFMax %float %dot_NV %float_0
OpStore %NdotV_val %NdotV

; Conditional coloring logic
%NdotV_val_loaded = OpLoad %float %NdotV_val
%cond = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %NdotV_val_loaded %float_0_5

OpSelectionMerge %merge_label None
OpIf %cond %if_block
%if_block = OpLabel
%g_if = OpFMul %float %float_2 %NdotV_val_loaded
%color_if = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %float_1 %g_if %float_0 %float_1
OpBranch %merge_label

%else_block = OpLabel
%diff = OpFSub %float %NdotV_val_loaded %float_0_5
%scaled_diff = OpFMul %float %diff %float_2
%r_g_else = OpFSub %float %float_1 %scaled_diff
%b_else = OpFMul %float %diff %float_2 ; This is incorrect, should be just scaled_diff
%color_else = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %r_g_else %r_g_else %scaled_diff %float_1 ; Corrected b_else calculation: just scaled_diff
OpBranch %merge_label

%merge_label = OpLabel
%final_color_phi = OpPhi %v4float %color_if %if_block %color_else %else_block
OpStore %finalColor %final_color_phi

; Store final color to output
%loaded_finalColor = OpLoad %v4float %finalColor
OpStore %outColor %loaded_finalColor

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Full Phong Model

View SPIR-V (5834 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 10
; Capabilities: Shader

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %tangent "tangent"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %_ubo "ubo"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpDecorate %_ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_ubo Binding 0

; GLSL.std.450 Imports
%glsl_std_450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %m4v4float %m4v4float %m4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%function = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_neg_1_0 = OpConstant %float -1.0
%float_32_0 = OpConstant %float 32.0

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5

%v3float_0_1_0_05_0_05 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_1 %float_0_05 %float_0_05
%v3float_1_0_1_0_1_0 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0
%v3float_0_0_0_0_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0

; Global Variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output

%_ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform ; The actual UBO instance

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %function
%entry = OpLabel
%id_worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%id_normal_val = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%id_color_val = OpLoad %v3float %color

%id_lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %_ubo %uint_3 ; lightPos is the 4th member (index 3)
%id_lightPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %id_lightPos_ptr

%id_cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %_ubo %uint_4 ; cameraPos is the 5th member (index 4)
%id_cameraPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %id_cameraPos_ptr

; Normalize Normal
%id_norm_N = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %id_normal_val

; Calculate Light Direction (L)
%id_lightPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %id_lightPos_val %id_lightPos_val %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2 ; Extract XYZ from lightPos (vec4)
%id_L_unnorm = OpFSub %v3float %id_lightPos_xyz %id_worldPos_val
%id_L = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %id_L_unnorm

; Calculate View Direction (V)
%id_cameraPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %id_cameraPos_val %id_cameraPos_val %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2 ; Extract XYZ from cameraPos (vec4)
%id_V_unnorm = OpFSub %v3float %id_cameraPos_xyz %id_worldPos_val
%id_V = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %id_V_unnorm

; Ambient Component
%id_ambient = OpCopyObject %v3float %v3float_0_1_0_05_0_05

; Diffuse Component
%id_NdotL = OpDot %float %id_norm_N %id_L
%id_max_NdotL = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 Max %id_NdotL %float_0_0
%id_diffuse = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %id_color_val %id_max_NdotL

; Specular Component
%id_neg_L = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %id_L %float_neg_1_0
%id_R = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Reflect %id_neg_L %id_norm_N
%id_RdotV = OpDot %float %id_R %id_V
%id_max_RdotV = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 Max %id_RdotV %float_0_0
%id_pow_RdotV = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 Pow %id_max_RdotV %float_32_0
%id_specular = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v3float_1_0_1_0_1_0 %id_pow_RdotV

; Sum components
%id_sum_ambient_diffuse = OpFAdd %v3float %id_ambient %id_diffuse
%id_final_rgb_unclamped = OpFAdd %v3float %id_sum_ambient_diffuse %id_specular

; Clamp to [0,1]
%id_final_rgb_clamped_min = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Fmax %id_final_rgb_unclamped %v3float_0_0_0_0_0_0
%id_final_rgb = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Fmin %id_final_rgb_clamped_min %v3float_1_0_1_0_1_0

; Construct output color with alpha 1.0
%id_final_rgb_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %id_final_rgb %uint_0
%id_final_rgb_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %id_final_rgb %uint_1
%id_final_rgb_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %id_final_rgb %uint_2
%id_outColor_val = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %id_final_rgb_x %id_final_rgb_y %id_final_rgb_z %float_1_0

OpStore %outColor %id_outColor_val

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd
Rendered: missing

Test 42: Geometry Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 0.00 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly geometry shader. It will be assembled with
spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0) and rendered using a fixed vertex shader and fragment shader.

**Geometry shader requirements:**
- `OpCapability Geometry`
- `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- `OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main"` listing ALL interface variables
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (InputPoints/InputLines/Triangles/InputLinesAdjacency/InputTrianglesAdjacency)
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (OutputPoints/OutputLineStrip/OutputTriangleStrip)
- `OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices ` (max vertices emitted)
- `OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1`

**Input from vertex shader (per-vertex arrays):**
The input gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block (must be decorated with Block + BuiltIn Position).
```
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
; Array size depends on input primitive:
; InputPoints: 1, InputLines: 2, Triangles: 3
; InputLinesAdjacency: 4, InputTrianglesAdjacency: 6
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_N
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
; Access: OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_i %int_0 -> gl_in[i].gl_Position
```

User-defined inputs are also arrays of the same size:
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos[]; ; positions in clip space
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal[]; ; vertex normals
layout(location = 2) in vec3 color[]; ; per-vertex colors
```

**Output (per emitted vertex):**
The output gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block:
```
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Store: OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0 -> gl_out.gl_Position
```
```
layout(location = 0) out vec3 outColor; ; color for fragment shader
```

**Emit vertices with:** `OpEmitVertex` after storing gl_Position and outColor.
**End primitive with:** `OpEndPrimitive` after emitting a complete strip.

**Available UBO (set=0, binding=0) - accessible from geometry shader:**
Same layout as test 41 (model/view/proj matrices, lightPos, cameraPos, params).

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text for the geometry shader.**


**Input primitive:** InputPoints (1 vertex per invocation, array size 1)
**Geometry:** 25 colored points in a 5x5 grid spread across [-0.8, 0.8].

**Task:** Expand each point into a small colored quad (4 vertices as triangle strip).
1. Read gl_in[0].gl_Position (the point position).
2. Read color[0] (the point's color).
3. Define a half-size: h = 0.04.
4. Emit 4 vertices forming a quad centered on the point:
- (x-h, y-h), (x+h, y-h), (x-h, y+h), (x+h, y+h)
- All with z=0, w=1, and the same color.
5. Output as triangle strip, max 4 vertices.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write GPU geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly. Geometry shaders receive primitives (points, lines, or triangles) and can output completely new geometry — for example, turning a single point into a billboard quad or a thin line into a thick ribbon.

Each subpass specifies a different input primitive type and a transformation task. The rendered output is compared pixel-by-pixel against a reference image. Writing geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly requires precise control of vertex emission and primitive topology.

               OpCapability Geometry
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out
               
               ; Execution modes for Geometry Shader
               OpExecutionMode %main Triangles
               OpExecutionMode %main TriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
               
               OpSource GLSL 450
               OpName %main "main"
               OpName %gl_PerVertex "gl_PerVertex"
               OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex 0 "gl_Position"
               OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex 1 "gl_PointSize"
               OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex 2 "gl_ClipDistance"
               OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex 3 "gl_CullDistance"
               OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
               OpName %gl_out ""

               ; Decorations for Built-ins
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex 1 BuiltIn PointSize
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex 2 BuiltIn ClipDistance
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_MemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex 3 BuiltIn CullDistance
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex Block

       %void = OpTypeVoid
          %3 = OpTypeFunction %void
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
       %uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
     %uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%_arr_float_uint_1 = OpTypeArray %float %uint_1

; Define the gl_PerVertex structure
%gl_PerVertex = OpTypeStruct %v4float %float %_arr_float_uint_1 %_arr_float_uint_1

; Input: Array of 3 gl_PerVertex (for Triangles)
     %uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%_arr_gl_PerVertex_uint_3 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex %uint_3
%_ptr_Input__arr_gl_PerVertex_uint_3 = OpTypePointer Input %_arr_gl_PerVertex_uint_3
      %gl_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input__arr_gl_PerVertex_uint_3 Input

; Output: Single gl_PerVertex block
%_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex
     %gl_out = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex Output

        %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
      %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
      %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
      %int_2 = OpConstant %int 2

%_ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

       %main = OpFunction %void None %3
          %5 = OpLabel

; --- Vertex 0 ---
         %18 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
         %19 = OpLoad %v4float %18
         %20 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v4float %gl_out %int_0
               OpStore %20 %19
               OpEmitVertex

; --- Vertex 1 ---
         %22 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
         %23 = OpLoad %v4float %22
         %24 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v4float %gl_out %int_0
               OpStore %24 %23
               OpEmitVertex

; --- Vertex 2 ---
         %26 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
         %27 = OpLoad %v4float %26
         %28 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v4float %gl_out %int_0
               OpStore %28 %27
               OpEmitVertex

               OpEndPrimitive
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Khronos Glslang Reference Front End; 10
; Bound: 40
; Schema: 0
               OpCapability Geometry
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_Position
               
               ; Geometry Shader Execution Modes
               OpExecutionMode %main InputTriangles
               OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3

               ; Debug/Name info
               OpName %main "main"
               OpName %gl_PerVertex "gl_PerVertex"
               OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex 0 "gl_Position"
               OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
               OpName %gl_out_block "gl_out_block"
               OpMemberName %gl_out_block 0 "gl_Position"
               OpName %gl_Position "gl_Position"

               ; Decorations
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_out_block 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %gl_out_block Block

               ; Types
          %void = OpTypeVoid
          %func = OpTypeFunction %void
          %float = OpTypeFloat 32
          %vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
          %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
          %uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
          %uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
          %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
          %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
          %int_2 = OpConstant %int 2

          ; Input Block (gl_in array of 3 vertices for triangles)
          %gl_PerVertex = OpTypeStruct %vec4
          %gl_in_array = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex %uint_3
          %ptr_input_array = OpTypePointer Input %gl_in_array
          %gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_array Input

          ; Output Block
          %gl_out_block = OpTypeStruct %vec4
          %ptr_output_block = OpTypePointer Output %gl_out_block
          %gl_Position = OpVariable %ptr_output_block Output

          ; Pointer types for members
          %ptr_input_float4 = OpTypePointer Input %vec4
          %ptr_output_float4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4

          ; Main Function
          %main = OpFunction %void None %func
          %label = OpLabel

          ; Vertex 0
          %in_pos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_float4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
          %in_pos0 = OpLoad %vec4 %in_pos0_ptr
          %out_pos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_float4 %gl_Position %int_0
          OpStore %out_pos0_ptr %in_pos0
          OpEmitVertex

          ; Vertex 1
          %in_pos1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_float4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
          %in_pos1 = OpLoad %vec4 %in_pos1_ptr
          %out_pos1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_float4 %gl_Position %int_0
          OpStore %out_pos1_ptr %in_pos1
          OpEmitVertex

          ; Vertex 2
          %in_pos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_float4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
          %in_pos2 = OpLoad %vec4 %in_pos2_ptr
          %out_pos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_float4 %gl_Position %int_0
          OpStore %out_pos2_ptr %in_pos2
          OpEmitVertex

          OpEndPrimitive
          OpReturn
          OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shader; 0
; Capabilities: Shader, Geometry
; Extensions:
; #line 1 "shader.geom"

OpCapability Shader
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %worldPos %normal %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main Triangles
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; All types and constants first
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_in "gl_PerVertex"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_in 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %_arr_gl_PerVertex_in_uint_3 "gl_PerVertex[3]"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_out "gl_PerVertex"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_out 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %gl_out "gl_out"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %_ "" ; This is for the UBO

; Define common types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_6 = OpConstant %int 6 ; For InputTrianglesAdjacency if needed, but not here.

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_3_0 = OpConstant %float 3.0

%v4float_3_0 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_3_0 %float_3_0 %float_3_0 %float_3_0
%v4float_0_7 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_7

%ptr_void_function = OpTypePointer Function %void
%ptr_input_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_output_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%ptr_uniform_m4v4f = OpTypePointer Uniform %m4v4float
%ptr_uniform_v4f = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%ptr_uniform_v3f = OpTypePointer Uniform %v3float
%ptr_function_v4 = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%ptr_function_v3 = OpTypePointer Function %v3float


; gl_PerVertex (input)
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in_uint_3 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_3 ; Input primitive: Triangles (3 vertices)
%ptr_input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in_uint_3
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in Input

; User-defined inputs (arrays of 3)
%arr_v3float_uint_3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_3
%ptr_input_arr_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_uint_3

%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0

%normal = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %normal Location 1

%color = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %color Location 2

; gl_PerVertex (output)
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_output_gl_PerVertex_out Output

; User-defined output
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3 Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO (set=0, binding=0) - "Same layout as test 41 (model/view/proj matrices, lightPos, cameraPos, params)"
; Assuming a common UBO structure for these.
%UBO_params = OpTypeStruct %m4v4float %m4v4float %m4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params 5 Offset 224 ; Assuming params is vec4
OpDecorate %UBO_params Block
%ptr_uniform_UBO_params = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_params
%_ = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_UBO_params Uniform
OpDecorate %_ DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_ Binding 0

; Main function
%void_function = OpTypeFunction %void
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_function
%entry = OpLabel

; Declare local variables for positions and colors
%p0_var = OpVariable %ptr_function_v4 Function
%p1_var = OpVariable %ptr_function_v4 Function
%p2_var = OpVariable %ptr_function_v4 Function
%c_var = OpVariable %ptr_function_v4 Function ; Centroid
%new_pos_var = OpVariable %ptr_function_v4 Function

%color0_var = OpVariable %ptr_function_v3 Function
%color1_var = OpVariable %ptr_function_v3 Function
%color2_var = OpVariable %ptr_function_v3 Function

; 1. Read the 3 vertex positions from gl_in[0..2].gl_Position.
%idx0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%load_p0 = OpLoad %v4float %idx0
OpStore %p0_var %load_p0

%idx1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%load_p1 = OpLoad %v4float %idx1
OpStore %p1_var %load_p1

%idx2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%load_p2 = OpLoad %v4float %idx2
OpStore %p2_var %load_p2

; Read colors
%color_idx0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3 %color %int_0
%load_color0 = OpLoad %v3float %color_idx0
OpStore %color0_var %load_color0

%color_idx1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3 %color %int_1
%load_color1 = OpLoad %v3float %color_idx1
OpStore %color1_var %load_color1

%color_idx2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3 %color %int_2
%load_color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color_idx2
OpStore %color2_var %load_color2


; 2. Compute centroid: C = (p0 + p1 + p2) / 3.
%p0_plus_p1 = OpFAdd %v4float %load_p0 %load_p1
%sum_p = OpFAdd %v4float %p0_plus_p1 %load_p2
%div_by_3 = OpFDiv %v4float %sum_p %v4float_3_0
OpStore %c_var %div_by_3

; 3. Shrink factor: s = 0.7. (Already defined as %float_0_7 and %v4float_0_7)

; 4. For each vertex i: new_pos = C + s * (pI - C).
; Vertex 0
%c_val = OpLoad %v4float %c_var
%p0_val = OpLoad %v4float %p0_var
%p0_minus_c = OpFSub %v4float %p0_val %c_val
%s_times_p0_minus_c = OpFMul %v4float %v4float_0_7 %p0_minus_c
%new_pos0 = OpFAdd %v4float %c_val %s_times_p0_minus_c
OpStore %new_pos_var %new_pos0

; Store new_pos to gl_out.gl_Position
%out_pos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_pos0_ptr %new_pos0

; Store original color to outColor
%out_color0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v3 %outColor
%load_color0_val = OpLoad %v3float %color0_var
OpStore %out_color0_ptr %load_color0_val

; Emit vertex 0
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1
%p1_val = OpLoad %v4float %p1_var
%p1_minus_c = OpFSub %v4float %p1_val %c_val
%s_times_p1_minus_c = OpFMul %v4float %v4float_0_7 %p1_minus_c
%new_pos1 = OpFAdd %v4float %c_val %s_times_p1_minus_c
OpStore %new_pos_var %new_pos1

%out_pos1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_pos1_ptr %new_pos1

%out_color1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v3 %outColor
%load_color1_val = OpLoad %v3float %color1_var
OpStore %out_color1_ptr %load_color1_val

; Emit vertex 1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2
%p2_val = OpLoad %v4float %p2_var
%p2_minus_c = OpFSub %v4float %p2_val %c_val
%s_times_p2_minus_c = OpFMul %v4float %v4float_0_7 %p2_minus_c
%new_pos2 = OpFAdd %v4float %c_val %s_times_p2_minus_c
OpStore %new_pos_var %new_pos2

%out_pos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_pos2_ptr %new_pos2

%out_color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v3 %outColor
%load_color2_val = OpLoad %v3float %color2_var
OpStore %out_color2_ptr %load_color2_val

; Emit vertex 2
OpEmitVertex

; 6. End primitive with: OpEndPrimitive
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Test 43: Fragment Shaders (HLSL) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing an HLSL pixel (fragment) shader for Vulkan. The shader will be
compiled with glslangValidator (-D flag for HLSL mode) targeting Vulkan 1.0,
then rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader, using Vulkan layout attributes):**
```hlsl
struct PSInput {
[[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0; // world-space position
[[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal : TEXCOORD1; // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
[[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv : TEXCOORD2; // texture coordinates in [0,1]
[[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent : TEXCOORD3; // tangent vector
[[vk::location(4)]] float3 color : TEXCOORD4; // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};
```

**Available constant buffer (set 0, binding 0):**
```hlsl
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
float4x4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
float4x4 view; // offset 64
float4x4 projection; // offset 128
float4 lightPos; // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
float4 cameraPos; // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
float4 params; // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};
```

**Required output:**
```hlsl
float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm
```

**HLSL requirements:**
- Use Vulkan-specific attributes: `[[vk::location(N)]]` for inputs, `[[vk::binding(B, S)]]` for UBO
- Entry point must be named `main`
- Return type is `float4` with `SV_Target0` semantic
- Standard HLSL intrinsics are available: normalize, dot, reflect, pow, max, clamp, lerp, etc.
- Use `mul()` for matrix-vector operations if needed

**Write ONLY the complete HLSL source code.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the shader source.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (float4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
